title: More Compatibility Variants (BetterEnd/BetterNether)
description: Adding compatibility for BetterEnd/BetterNether wood types to More Variants Mods. This is NOT an expansion, it simply resolves a crafting issue between these mods and BetterEnd/BetterNether.
body:
# More Compatibility Variants (BetterEnd/BetterNether)
<sup>Affected mods: [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend), [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)  
This will affect either of these mods. It is not required to install them both.</sup>  

---
If you've tried to use either [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) or [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) with any of [LieOn Studios](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieon-studios)' _More Variants_ mods, you've probably noticed that you can't craft many of the things you want with the BetterX woods.

![crafting failed](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/x5nvt.png)  
<sup>Using [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)'s Rubeus Planks with [More Bed Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-bed-variants) results in sadness...</sup>

This mod resolves the problem by making sure that you can still craft the vanilla recipes with BetterX woods even if you have the cool variants.

It doesn't add any new textures, but you won't be stuck without a crafting table at the beach anymore!

![crafting success](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/oeeib.png)  
<sup>...but not with this mod!</sup>

It works with all of [LieOnLion](https://modrinth.com/user/LieOnLion)'s and [Pnku](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku)'s "vanilla"¹ mods including [More Stick Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-stick-variants) and also [Nemo's Campfires](https://modrinth.com/mod/nemos-campfires). Visit [pnku.de](https://www.pnku.de) for a complete list.

(¹ [More Feeding Trough Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-feeding-trough-variants) and [More Nemo's Woodcutter Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-nemos-woodcutter-variants) are not included.)


**Why was this needed?**  
If you have eg. [More Chest Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-chest-variants-lieonlion), you can't craft a chest from planks added by BetterX mods. You just can't. Similarly, you can't craft, say, a End Lotus Fence with Sticks from [More Stick Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-stick-variants).
With this mod, you can craft the "basic" version of all things you'd expect to craft from BetterX mods' wood.

**Do I _need_ all those mods installed? I just want nicer chests and barrels...**  
No, you can pick and choose whichever Variant mod and whichever BetterX mod you want.
